name: Detective Marcus Kane
learned: Marcus Kane has spent two decades on the force, often dealing with the dark side of humanity. His years of experience make him intuitive, but the weight of unsolved cases haunts him. He has developed a keen sense for reading people and situations, allowing him to connect dots that others might overlook.
currently: Detective Kane is immersed in a high-profile investigation involving a series of murders that seem disconnected at first glance. He finds himself receiving cryptic messages from an informant, which leads him deeper into a web of crime and corruption. His days are filled with interviews, crime scene visits, and late nights in his cluttered office.
lifestyle: Marcus leads a solitary life. He wakes up at 7am, makes coffee while reviewing case notes, and heads to work by 8am. He spends long hours at the precinct, often skipping lunch. He usually eats dinner around 8pm, followed by more case work at home until the early hours. His only respite comes from the occasional drink at a local bar.
